creator: cat@bsd.com.br
text:
When portupgrade a clamav port to 0.96 (clamav-0.95.3 < needs updating (port has 0.96) a permission of files:
/var/db/clamav
/var/run/clamv
/var/log/clamav

change to 76:0.

But simscan use a simscan:simscan users, ang get the error message em smtpd log :  message temporarly not accepted because: mail server temporarily rejected message (#4.3.0)

error in clamd.log
Mon Apr 12 13:59:57 2010 -> WARNING: lstat() failed on: /var/qmail/simscan/1271091590.675979.30039
